title: solidago coreana var. nana
intro: Solidago coreana var. nana, also known as the dwarf core goldenrod, is a small shrub native to East Asia, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Solidago coreana var. nana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
